description_long: This modern bungalow features a two-story structure with a combination of dark and natural wood exterior cladding, complemented by a stone base. The front facade includes a prominent balcony with a glass railing above a covered porch, accessible by a central staircase. Large windows dominate the right side of the building, providing ample natural light to the interior, while smaller windows are distributed asymmetrically on the other sides. The property is landscaped with green grass, flowering trees, and shrubs, and includes a paved walkway leading to the entrance. The roof is a simple gable style, finished in a dark material. Outdoor amenities such as a fire pit and seating area are visible, enhancing the residential appeal.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with wood, stone, and dark cladding, featuring a balcony, large windows, and landscaped surroundings with trees and a fire pit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central staircase, covered porch, balcony with glass railing, and two large trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the gable roof, and the arrangement of trees and fire pit area on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mix of large and small windows, stone base, and extensive greenery with trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the staircase, side entrance, and a clear view of the gable roof and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped side windows
